rules: Implementation must be scalable and maintainable.
Maintain consistency with the existing architecture, folder structure, naming conventions, and coding patterns.
Always work on the main branch.
After a successful commit, remove the completed step from the plan.
Reuse existing components and patterns whenever possible.
Avoid overengineering. Build the simplest scalable solution that meets current requirements. Do not add abstractions, optimizations, or features without a clear need.

steps.title: Implement page sub-classes
steps.description: Allow each page to contain multiple sub-pages (sub-classes) that can be managed directly from the page view.
requirements: Display sub-pages section below the page header.
Provide a quick-add button for creating an empty sub-page.
Provide a template button for creating a sub-page from predefined templates.

templateModal.behavior: Open a modal containing available templates.
requirements: Create a new sub-page from the selected template.

acceptanceCriteria: Sub-pages are visible under the page header.
Users can create sub-pages from templates.
No page reload is required after creation.
UI remains responsive and consistent with existing design.
